LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. RESPONDENT MICHAEL NIELSEN'S SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT AND REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY FEES IS CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 10, 2012. PLAINTIFF MUST DELIVER A COURTESY COPY OF THE FLEMING DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF ITS APPLICATION FOR A PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION TO DEPARTMENT 302 NO LATER THAN 4PM OCTOBER 1. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE AND POS FILED BY PETITIONER WELLS FARGO ADVISORS, LLC HEARING SET FOR AUG-23-2012 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION, 302, RULING: THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTED THE TENTATIVE RULING AS MODIFIED. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR A PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF IS UNLIKELY TO PREVAIL ON THE MERITS. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT ESTABLISHED ANY BASIS TO ENJOIN THE ARBITRATION FROM PROCEEDING. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT PRESENTED ANY EVIDENCE TO DEMONSTRATE THAT THE FEDERAL ACTION ( A.G. EDWARDS & SONS, INC. V. NIELSEN (ACTION NO. C07-02185)) STARTED IN COURT AND ENDED IN CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION. FURTHER, THE FEDERAL ACTION AND UNDERLYING ARBITRATION ACTION WERE PURSUED CONCURRENTLY BY PLAINTIFF. IN ADDITION, BREADTH OF ARBITRATION CLAUSE IN EMPLOYMENT AGREEMENT COVERS ALL DISPUTES. WHETHER OR NOT THIS CAUSE OF ACTION EXISTS IS FOR THE ARBITRATOR TO DECIDE. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT ESTABLISHED THAT PROCEEDING WITH THE ARBITRATION WOULD RESULT IN IRREPARABLE HARM TO IT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR # 5976

PRO HAC VICE RENEWAL FEE STATUS FOR ATTORNEY RETTA A MILLER
Off Calendar Feb-21-2014 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Special Mtn And Special Mtn To Strike Complaint And Req. For Attorney Fees And Pos
Off Calendar Oct-10-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. RETTA A. MILLER OF JACKSON WALKER LLP, TEL. NO. (214) 953-6000 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
ATTY. RAYMOND ERLACH, TEL. NO. 788-3322 APPEARING FOR THE RESPONDENT.

RULING - A R G U E D; RESPONDENT MICHAEL NIELSEN'S special Motion To Strike Complaint And Request For Attorney Fees is taken under submission. Each side to submit form of order for the court's consideration. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 =302/HK

Ntc Of Special Mtn And Special Mtn To Strike Complaint And Req. For Attorney Fees And Pos
Off Calendar Sep-28-2012 Continued To Oct-10-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. RESPONDENT MICHAEL NIELSEN'S Special Motion To Strike Complaint And Request For Attorney Fees is continued to October 10, 2012. Plaintiff must deliver a courtesy copy of the Fleming Declaration in Support of its application for a preliminary injunction to department 302 no later than 4pm October 1. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

Plaintiff'S Motion For A Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Aug-23-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Retta A. Miller, Esq. of Jackson Walker, Tel. 214.953.6035, for Plaintiff and moving party;
Raymond Erlach, Esq. of L/O of Raymond Erlach, Tel. 415.290.9662, for Defendant and opposing party.

RULING: The matter was argued. The court adopted the tentative ruling as modified. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR A PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION is Denied. Plaintiff is unlikely to prevail on the merits. Plaintiff has not established any basis to enjoin the arbitration from proceeding. Plaintiff has not presented any evidence to demonstrate that the federal action ( A.G. Edwards & Sons, Inc. v. Nielsen (Action No. C07-02185)) started in court and ended in contractual arbitration. Further, the federal action and underlying arbitration action were pursued concurrently by Plaintiff. In addition, breadth of arbitration clause in employment agreement covers all disputes. Whether or not this cause of action exists is for the arbitrator to decide. Plaintiff has not established that proceeding with the arbitration would result in irreparable harm to it. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Aug-23-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
G. Thomas Fleming III, Esq. of Jones Bell Abbott Fleming & Fitzgerald, Tel. 213.485.1555, for Plaintiff and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The court adopted the tentative ruling. VERIFIED APPLICATION OF RETTA A. MILLER FOR ADMISSION AS COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE FOR PETITIONER WELLS FARGO ADVISORS, LLC is Granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976
